\# Documentation Instructions

\#\# Purpose

Define the documentation standards for the Data Analytics Portfolio Platform (DAPP).

These instructions apply to all technical, functional and project documentation.

\---

\#\# General Principles

Always:

\- Follow the Documentation First principle.  
\- Keep documentation synchronized with implementation.  
\- Write documentation in Markdown.  
\- Use English for technical content.  
\- Keep documentation clear, concise and structured.  
\- Ensure documentation is version controlled.

\---

\#\# Documentation Standards

Every document should:

\- Have a clear title.  
\- Define its purpose.  
\- Follow the approved document structure.  
\- Use consistent headings.  
\- Include version information when applicable.  
\- Reference related documents when appropriate.

\---

\#\# Writing Style

Use:

\- Clear and objective language.  
\- Short paragraphs.  
\- Bullet lists where appropriate.  
\- Descriptive section titles.  
\- Consistent terminology.

Avoid:

\- Ambiguous descriptions.  
\- Duplicated information.  
\- Unnecessary explanations.  
\- Informal language in technical documentation.

\---

\#\# Documentation Updates

Whenever a change affects:

\- Architecture  
\- Repository structure  
\- Technology stack  
\- Features  
\- Security  
\- Configuration

Update the corresponding documentation before completing the work.

Documentation must always reflect the current implementation.

\---

\#\# File Organization

Store documentation only in approved locations.

Respect the documented folder hierarchy.

Do not create new documentation folders without approval.

\---

\#\# Naming Convention

Use:

\- English language.  
\- Descriptive names.  
\- kebab-case for filenames where applicable.  
\- Official DAPP document codes for controlled documentation.

Examples:

\- DAPP-DOC-010-System\_Architecture.md  
\- DAPP-ADR-001-Technology\_Stack.md

\---

\#\# AI Documentation Rules

When generating documentation:

\- Follow approved ADRs.  
\- Follow the System Architecture.  
\- Do not invent requirements.  
\- Maintain consistency with existing documentation.  
\- Reference related documents when appropriate.  
\- Avoid contradicting previously approved documents.

\---

\#\# Quality Checklist

Before completing documentation, verify:

\- Grammar.  
\- Formatting.  
\- Consistency.  
\- Correct references.  
\- Updated version.  
\- No duplicated content.  
\- Compliance with the approved document standard.

\---

\#\# Reference Documents

\- DAPP-DOC-000-Document\_Standard.md  
\- DAPP-DOC-010-System\_Architecture.md  
\- DAPP-ADR-001-Technology\_Stack.md  
\- DAPP-ADR-002-Repository\_Strategy.md
